allow: PowerShell($tools = @{}; foreach \($t in 'node','npm','java','javac','gradle','electron','python','git'\) { $cmd = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { $v = \(& $cmd --version 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 1\); $tools[$t] = "$\($cmd.Source\) -> $v" } else { $tools[$t] = 'NO INSTALADO' } }; $tools.GetEnumerator\(\) | Sort-Object Name | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs", "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs", "$env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)\\nodejs", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk", "$env:ProgramFiles\\Android\\Android Studio", "$env:APPDATA\\npm"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "EXISTE: $p" } else { Write-Output "no: $p" } })
